# Lịch Việt — Vietnamese Lunar Calendar PWA

> Single-file (~125KB) Progressive Web App implementing the Hồ Ngọc Đức / Jean Meeus 1998 Vietnamese lunar calendar algorithm at UTC+7. Runs fully offline. Covers solar↔lunar conversion, Can Chi (sexagenary cycle), Hoàng Đạo (auspicious days), 46 Vietnamese holidays, and ICS calendar export. Validated zero-error against reference implementation for 51,135 days (1960–2099).

## Key facts

- **Algorithm:** Hồ Ngọc Đức port of Jean Meeus, *Astronomical Algorithms* (1998)
- **Timezone:** UTC+7 (Vietnamese standard, 105°E) — matches printed lịch blốc exactly
- **Validated range:** 1960–2099 (51,135 days, 0 errors vs. reference)
- **Tech:** Vanilla JavaScript (ES2020), zero build step, one HTML file, PWA
- **Privacy:** 100% client-side, localStorage only, zero tracking, zero analytics
- **License:** MIT
- **Live app:** https://bao-vn.github.io/lich-viet-pwa/
- **Source:** https://github.com/bao-vn/lich-viet-pwa
- **MCP server for AI agents:** https://www.npmjs.com/package/lich-viet-mcp

- [Wiki — Features](https://github.com/bao-vn/lich-viet-pwa/wiki/Features): end-user feature list

## API for AI agents (MCP)

AI agents can call the Vietnamese lunar calendar algorithm directly via Model Context Protocol:

- `solar_to_lunar(day, month, year)` → `{ld, lm, ly, leap}` (Vietnamese lunar date for a Gregorian date)
- `lunar_to_solar(lunar_day, lunar_month, lunar_year, is_leap)` → `{d, m, y}`
- `get_can_chi_day(day, month, year)` → e.g. `"Ất Hợi"`
- `get_can_chi_year(year)` → e.g. `"Bính Tuất 🐶"` (year of the Dog)
- `check_hoang_dao(day, month, year)` → `true` if auspicious day, `false` otherwise
- `get_vn_holidays(day, month, year)` → array of Vietnamese holidays on that date

Install for Claude Desktop:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "lich-viet": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "lich-viet-mcp"] }
  }
}
```

See [mcp-server/README.md](https://github.com/bao-vn/lich-viet-pwa/blob/main/mcp-server/README.md) for full docs and examples.
